# Test source

```ts
   1 | import { test, expect } from '../fixtures/baseFixture';
   2 | import { STANDARD_USER, INVALID_USER } from '../data/credentials';
   3 |
   4 | test.describe('Login form tests', { tag: ['@smoke', '@login'] }, () => {
   5 |   /**
   6 |   * @testrail 1
   7 |   */
   8 |   test('Verify that user can login with valid credentials', async ({ app }) => {
   9 |     await app.login.open();
  10 |     await app.login.login(STANDARD_USER);
  11 |
> 12 |     await expect(app.products.productsTitle).toBeVisible();

  13 |   });
  14 |
  15 |   /**

  17 |   */
  18 |   test('Verify that user can not login with invalid credentials', async ({ app }) => {
  19 |     await app.login.open();
  20 |     await app.login.login(INVALID_USER);
  21 |
  22 |     await expect(app.login.errorAlert).toHaveText(
  23 |       'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service'
  24 |     );
  25 |   });
  26 |
  27 |   /**
  28 |   * @testrail 3
  29 |   */
  30 |   test('Verify that user can not login without credentials', async ({ app }) => {
  31 |     await app.login.open();
  32 |     await app.login.submitLogin();
  33 |
  34 |     await expect(app.login.userNameInputField).not.toHaveClass(/error/);
  35 |     await expect(app.login.passwordInputField).toHaveClass(/error/);
  36 |   });
  37 | });
  38 |
```
